nasb.text: If they say to us, ‘Wait until we come to you’; then we will stand in our place and not go up to them.

esv.text: If they say to us, ‘Wait until we come to you,’ then we will stand still in our place, and we will not go up to them.

cnv.text: 如果他們對我們這樣說：‘你們站住！等我們到你們那裡去。’我們就站在原地，不上他們那裡去。

ccb.text: 如果他们说，‘站住，等我们去你们那里！’我们就待在原地，不去他们那里。
